name: MP9 | 干旱季节
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. This memento from Gwalior has been spray-painted using ripped tape strips and perforated metal as stencils. Don't worry...business is about to pick up - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把来自瓜廖尔堡的纪念武器以撕开的胶带和金属穿孔为漏字板进行了喷漆。 别担心…事业很快会东山再起的 - 军火商布兹
